guide_pink_fabric_under_presser_foot.query: with both hands beside the sewing-machine needle, the worker continuously steers the edge of pink fabric while the fabric advances beneath the presser foot

remove_pink_fabric_from_sewing_machine.query: after a sewing pass, the worker pulls the sewn pink fabric away from the needle and presser foot and moves that completed piece toward the pile at the upper left

take_next_pink_fabric_from_pile.query: with the previous sewn piece moved aside, the worker reaches into the pink fabric pile at the upper left, separates one new piece, and brings that piece down to the center workspace

spread_and_align_pink_fabric_edges.query: at the center of the table away from the presser foot, the worker opens one pink fabric piece wide, then pinches and follows its long edge with both hands to align the two layers before sewing

position_pink_fabric_at_presser_foot.query: after aligning the long pink fabric edge on the center table, the worker carries that aligned edge upward to the sewing-machine needle and seats it at the presser foot before the fabric begins advancing
